event_prob_dimension_specs.name: energy_gate
event_prob_dimension_specs.description: 基于能量阈值的启发式活动门，不是设计态 fric/closure/burst 语义。

event_prob_dimension_specs.name: abs_delta_gate
event_prob_dimension_specs.description: 基于帧间幅度变化的启发式变化门，不是显式事件类别。

event_prob_dimension_specs.name: high_zero_cross
event_prob_dimension_specs.description: 基于过零率的高噪声启发式指标，不等价于设计态 fric 类别。

event_prob_dimension_specs.name: low_zero_cross_voiced_like
event_prob_dimension_specs.description: 基于低过零率的浊音倾向启发式指标，不是设计态 p_voicing。

event_prob_dimension_specs.name: high_zero_cross_voiced_like
event_prob_dimension_specs.description: 带 voiced-like 门的高过零率启发式指标，不是命名辅音语义。

event_prob_dimension_specs.name: delta_energy_rise
event_prob_dimension_specs.description: 基于能量上升的启发式变化指标，不是显式 burst 标签。

event_prob_dimension_specs.name: delta_energy_fall
event_prob_dimension_specs.description: 基于能量下降的启发式变化指标，不是显式 closure 标签。

event_prob_dimension_specs.name: energy_norm
event_prob_dimension_specs.description: 归一化能量启发式指标，不是设计态 event semantic。

event_semantics.recommended_contract_interpretation: 当前 event_probs 只能解释为旧 offline MVP 启发式帧级事件目标，不能再当作设计稿中的命名 e_evt 语义。

event_dimension_specs.name: p_frication
event_dimension_specs.description: 由 legacy event_probs 的高过零率维度桥接而来的摩擦倾向概率。

event_dimension_specs.name: p_stop_closure
event_dimension_specs.description: 由 legacy event_probs 的能量下降维度桥接而来的闭塞倾向概率。

event_dimension_specs.name: p_burst
event_dimension_specs.description: 由 legacy event_probs 的能量上升维度桥接而来的爆破倾向概率。

event_dimension_specs.name: p_voicing
event_dimension_specs.description: 由 legacy event_probs 的低过零率 voiced-like 维度桥接而来的浊音概率。

event_dimension_specs.name: a_aper
event_dimension_specs.description: 由 legacy event_probs 的高过零率维度桥接而来的非周期性强度。

event_dimension_specs.name: p_pause_boundary
event_dimension_specs.description: 由 target timing semantic sidecar 的 pause boundary window 栅格化得到的停顿边界概率。

event_dimension_specs.name: p_terminal_boundary
event_dimension_specs.description: 由 target timing semantic sidecar 的 terminal boundary window 栅格化得到的终止边界概率。

event_dimension_specs.name: p_final_clause
event_dimension_specs.description: 由 target timing semantic sidecar 的 final/single clause region 栅格化得到的句尾子句概率。

notes: 这不是最终 teacher 真值版 e_evt，而是当前仓库资产可支撑的 design-state bootstrap bridge。
p_frication / p_stop_closure / p_burst / p_voicing / a_aper 由 teacher_e_evt bridge mode 控制的 bootstrap 规则生成。
当前 teacher_e_evt bridge mode = legacy_event_probs_v1。
p_pause_boundary / p_terminal_boundary / p_final_clause 由 target timing semantic sidecar 栅格化得到。
当前 teacher_e_evt target shaping mode = hard_box_v1。
当前版本还不包含 place / manner 分类，也不能冒充完整最终设计稿语义。
This contract upgrades the teacher-first downstream packet to the C-prime v2-core baseline plus the first explicit downstream e_evt bridge for the experimental Stage5 route.
f0_hz / vuv / aper / E are produced by a deterministic source acoustic state extraction chain aligned to the teacher runtime frame grid.
aper-v1 is a single scalar per frame in [0, 1], where 0 is more periodic and 1 is more aperiodic; it is intended for the noise branch only.
Current legacy event_probs are still retained as diagnostic compatibility fields and still follow the offline_mvp_heuristic_event_target_v1 label space.

e_evt is now exported explicitly as a downstream bootstrap bridge; because this runtime packet has no source-aware boundary sidecar, the boundary-related e_evt dimensions remain zero-filled diagnostics rather than claimed true boundary supervision.
r_res and final_vocoder_waveform remain intentionally absent because Phase C3 stays on the no-res baseline route.
